matrix.criterion: engine/split/ can be configured to use a real gRPC-backed SplitProposer calling ProposeSplit
matrix.check: GRPCSplitProposer type + NewGRPCSplitProposer constructor added, implements split.SplitProposer (compile-time assertion)

matrix.criterion: task-2b.2's mock remains available for pure-unit tests
matrix.test: git diff --stat shows no change to engine/split/proposer_mock.go

matrix.check: translateProposeSplitResponse helper maps proto SplitFileProposal/SectionRange to internal types

matrix.criterion: Error handling: transport/server errors surface as non-nil error, zero SplitPlan
matrix.check: gRPC status errors wrapped and returned, never panics

matrix.criterion: Timeout handling: client-side deadline produces a bounded, sensible error (not a hang)
matrix.check: context.WithTimeout wraps the call when configured timeout > 0
matrix.test: TestGRPCSplitProposer/timeout (asserts DeadlineExceeded-style error within bounded wall time)

matrix.criterion: Real wire round-trip, not a mocked interface
matrix.check: bufconn.Listener + real grpc.Server + real grpc client connection in test helper
matrix.test: TestGRPCSplitProposer (all subtests go over bufconn, not a hand-rolled fake HiveMindClient)

matrix.criterion: go vet / gofmt / go build clean
matrix.check: gofmt -l, go vet ./..., go build ./... all clean from engine/

matrix.criterion: -race on concurrency-relevant test; explicit -timeout on every go test invocation
engine/rpc/server.go's ProposeSplit remains Unimplemented (server-side out of scope)
matrix.check: engine/rpc/server.go not modified by this subtask
matrix.test: git diff --stat shows no change to engine/rpc/server.go
